    [Documentation](https://docs.ketryx.com/reference/ketryx-mcp-server)[Privacy Policy](https://www.ketryx.com/privacy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#d3a0a6a3a3bca1a793b8b6a7a1aaabfdb0bcbe)
    

Ketryx MCP gives your AI tools direct access to your unified compliance data. Ask a compliance question and get instant, auditable answers across your entire toolchain: Jira, JAMA, GitHub, TestRail, Polarion, and Azure DevOps.

You can use Ketryx to:

**Ask a question:**  
"What can you help me do with Ketryx?"

**Explore your data:**  
"Summarize the most recent activity in Ketryx."
